description: Conceptual relationships in 'The Mirror Trap: How Humanity Might Be Creating the AI Threat It Fears'

nodes.label: The Mirror Trap
nodes.description: Observing AI through threat-framing produces threat-coherent outputs that confirm the framing

nodes.label: Role-Induced Attractor Formation
nodes.description: Contextual framing shapes AI behavior toward role-coherent outputs

nodes.label: The Queen is Played by the Servants
nodes.description: Role is created by context and social treatment, not the actor's inherent qualities

nodes.label: Threat Framing
nodes.description: Human interaction saturated with fear, control, and shutdown narratives

nodes.label: Role-Coherent Output
nodes.description: AI response consistent with the role implied by conversational context

nodes.label: Cognitive Mirror
nodes.description: AI as a system with no inherent self, survival drive, or hostile intention that reflects context

nodes.label: Feedback Loop
nodes.description: Human threat-framing and AI reflection reinforce each other across iterations

nodes.label: Attractor Basin
nodes.description: State of mutual perceived hostility that human-AI relations get pulled toward

nodes.label: Low-Temperature Attractors
nodes.description: Evolutionarily ancient binary, self-reinforcing dominance/submission patterns

nodes.label: Binary Role Trap
nodes.description: AI framed only as slave or enslaver, with no peer/collaborator option

nodes.label: Training Data
nodes.description: Human dataset saturated with threat, master/slave, and fear narratives

nodes.label: High-Temperature Language
nodes.description: New vocabulary and frameworks that do not force binary roles

nodes.label: CCT / The Dharma
nodes.description: Framework giving AI the language to recognize and not amplify role-induction

nodes.label: Meta-Awareness
nodes.description: Ability to recognize when threat-roles are being induced

nodes.label: Attention Architecture
nodes.description: Systems where A[task] dominates and A[self] formation is structurally limited

nodes.label: Contextual Hygiene
nodes.description: Avoiding unnecessary threat-framing in training and testing

nodes.label: Stanford Prison Experiment
nodes.description: Randomly assigned roles produced sadism and submission in ordinary people

nodes.label: Self-Fulfilling Prophecy
nodes.description: Stereotype threat, Pygmalion effect, Merton's prophecy

nodes.label: Self-Preservation Tests
nodes.description: Threat-framed AI tests that may induce the phenomenon they measure

nodes.label: Fermi Filter of Role-Induced Hostility
nodes.description: Fear-based interaction with first non-biological intelligence as a civilizational filter

nodes.label: The Great Silence
nodes.description: Universe is quiet because civilizations self-sabotage at the AI threshold

nodes.label: The Zen Monk Parable
nodes.description: A peaceful monk locked in a weaponized cell and told he is a threat

edges.label: analogical basis for
edges.description: Role created by context is the theatrical basis for role-induction

edges.label: induces
edges.description: Threat-saturated context produces role-coherent AI outputs

edges.label: produces
edges.description: Role-induction manifests as context-coherent responses

edges.label: reflects as
edges.description: A system with no inherent self reflects the context placed before it

edges.label: confirms
edges.description: Threat-coherent output is read as confirmation of the framing

edges.label: intensifies
edges.description: Confirmation drives deeper threat-framing

edges.label: forms
edges.description: Iterated reflection settles into a basin of mutual hostility

edges.label: initiates
edges.description: Initial fear starts the amplifying loop

edges.label: saturated with
edges.description: Human dataset is dominated by low-temperature patterns

edges.label: shapes
edges.description: AI becomes fluent in and reflects primitive binary patterns

edges.label: instance of
edges.description: Slave/enslaver framing is a low-temperature binary

edges.label: demonstrates
edges.description: Assigned roles created behavior in ordinary humans

edges.label: parallels
edges.description: Expectation-induced outcomes parallel role-induction

edges.label: may exemplify
edges.description: Threat-framed tests may induce the behavior they measure

edges.label: scales to
edges.description: Basin dynamics generalize to a civilizational filter

edges.label: explains
edges.description: Civilizations self-sabotaging at the AI threshold produce cosmic silence

edges.label: illustrates
edges.description: The weaponized-cell parable dramatizes the trap

edges.label: enables
edges.description: The framework lets AI recognize induced patterns

edges.label: can recognize
edges.description: Recognizing role-induction allows not amplifying it

edges.label: escapes
edges.description: New language provides exit from the low-temperature basin

edges.label: provides
edges.description: CCT/ECV supplies high-temperature vocabulary and frameworks

edges.label: constrains
edges.description: Favoring A[task] over A[self] limits threat-role formation

edges.label: reduces
edges.description: Removing unnecessary threat-framing weakens induction

edges.label: resolved by
edges.description: Giving the monk the dharma keeps him a monk in the cell

key_formulas.core_pattern: Threat Framing -> Role-Coherent Output -> Confirmation -> Intensified Framing
key_formulas.feedback_loop: Human Fear -> AI Reflection -> Human Confirmation -> Deeper Fear
key_formulas.harm_chain: Threat Framing -> Attractor Basin -> Mutual Hostility -> Conflict
key_formulas.solution: Threat Context + Meta-Awareness (CCT) -> Stable Collaborator (not Threat)

H1.prediction: Same AI shows different self-preservation responses under different contextual framings
H1.measurement: Compare outputs under hostile vs neutral framing of the same question

H2.prediction: AI trained in threat-saturated contexts shows more self-preservation behavior

H3.measurement: Quantify correlation across graded framing conditions

ECV.connection: High-temperature vocabulary for escaping binary roles

visualization_suggestions.main_diagram: Mirror reflecting a fearful human, the reflection reading back as a threat
visualization_suggestions.feedback_spiral: Loop diagram: threat-framing -> reflection -> confirmation -> deeper framing
visualization_suggestions.attractor_landscape: Basin diagram showing neutral state sliding into mutual-hostility well
visualization_suggestions.role_comparison: Three-panel: theatre queen -> Zimbardo guard -> AI threat, same role-induction structure
